title.en: The Great Ancestor of the Starhorn Clan said in...

content.en:
"It's the people of the Forbidden Temple!"

The Great Ancestor of the Starhorn Clan said in a low voice.

At the same time, the other Dao Ancestors nearby also noticed the people of the Forbidden Palace, and even the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor who had been closing his eyes in a palace in the distance also opened his eyes and focused some of his attention on the people of the Forbidden Palace.

"The people of the Forbidden Palace, they are here too!"

Regarding the arrival of the people of the Forbidden Palace, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not surprised at all, but the other party came relatively quickly this time.

Because the Forbidden Hall rarely has anything to do with things in the chaos, and although the matter of the Quasi-Dao Realm is very noisy, it is actually not spreading quickly, and the major forces are almost in control of the news, and they are unwilling to inform the four transcendent forces.

But the four transcendent forces still came one by one, and the Starhorn clan came because the Starhorn clan occasionally had people go out to practice, but there were very few people in the forbidden hall, and even sometimes no one would necessarily come out to experience in an era, but I didn't expect to get the news.

Regarding the origin of the Forbidden Palace, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor didn't know much, only that it was a group of forces that were wandering away from the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Of course, even the extremely mysterious Forbidden Hall only dared to wander around the periphery of the Dark Forbidden Domain, but they had mastered a special method that allowed them to go deeper into the Dark Forbidden Realm and stay much longer than other Dao Ancestors.

It is rumored that the people of the Forbidden Temple have carved out a small place in the outermost part of the Dark Forbidden Realm as a safe area.

This kind of ability made the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor frightened, and no one knew whether the news was true or not.

But the Forbidden Hall is really powerful, and any Dao Ancestor who comes out is a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and even a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

There was once a top power with the same strength as the Void Heaven that offended the Forbidden Palace, and it was said that he wanted to explore the secrets of the Forbidden Palace and completely make enemies with the Forbidden Palace, but as a result, a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor directly leveled the top power, completely shocked the countless forces of Chaos, and also gave people a new understanding of the transcendent forces.

I saw that the people in the Forbidden Hall were wearing black armor one by one, and it was said that this black armor was made of a material in the dark forbidden area, and it had the effect of absorbing attack power.

But ordinary people can't wear this kind of black armor, once they wear it, it is easy to be invaded by a strange force to invade the soul, and only the strong people of the Forbidden Hall can wear this kind of armor.

And this armor also has a name - forbidden armor!

"Six Dao Ancestors, Ten True Monarchs!"

This is all the personnel of the Forbidden Hall who came, and the number is very rare, but even those True Monarchs of the Star Horn Beast do not dare to underestimate the True Monarch of the Forbidden Palace, because the people of the Forbidden Hall are very strong and strong, even if they are True Monarchs, they must be real demon geniuses.

Two of the four transcendent forces came today, will the other two transcendent forces also send people?

"Another force is coming!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor muttered.

In front of everyone's eyes, a group of chaotic beings tore through the space, and there were very many of them.

"It's the people of the Chaos Life Alliance, and they're here too!"

Many Dao Ancestors were surprised.

The Chaos Life Alliance is composed of a large number of Chaos Life races, but it does not include all Chaos Life races, such as the Starhorn Clan, which does not look down on the Chaos Life Alliance.

The reason why the Chaos Life Alliance is a transcendent force is different from the Forbidden Temple and the Starhorn Clan, the Forbidden Temple and the Starhorn Clan are truly individual and powerful, but the Chaos Life Alliance relies on a large number.

For example, the Chaos Life Alliance, if it is a Dao Ancestor alone, there are thousands, although most of them are ordinary Heavenly Dao Ancestors, but the number is enough to form a crushing thing, and other top forces can't beat the Chaos Life Alliance at all.

And the True Ancestor and True Monarch of the Chaos Life Alliance are even more, and it is difficult to describe them in number.

The Chaos Life Alliance also has its own territory, a large territory, and basically only the universe and Dao realm born in the territory of the Chaos Life Alliance belong to them.

Ye Tian's Quasi-Dao Realm was subordinate to the cultivator forces, but now the Chaos Life Alliance had also come over to intervene.

However, today, the two transcendent forces of the Forbidden Hall and the Starhorn Clan have arrived, and the top forces naturally do not dare to stop the Chaos Life Alliance.

The Chaos Life Alliance came this time with nearly a hundred Dao Ancestors, millions of True Monarchs, this is definitely just an advance force, and other Dao Ancestors will definitely come one by one, after all, Dao Ancestors are not willing to let go of such a great opportunity as the Domain Fragment.

In fact.

The Dao Ancestors of several transcendent forces have not really realized the opportunity contained in the domain boundary fragments, otherwise it is estimated that they will all come this time.

At this time, the three transcendent forces have all come, and only the last transcendent force remains.

Obviously, the four transcendent forces have probably all been in contact with each other and know about the Quasi-Dao Realm, so the last transcendent force will definitely come.

It didn't take long for everyone to wait, and only an hour later, the last transcendent force arrived.

This transcendent force is the real Chaos Overlord-level force, above the other three transcendent forces, and even the powerhouses of the Forbidden Hall are absolutely unwilling to provoke this transcendent force.

This transcendent force is Daoshan!

Dao Mountain is the first transcendent force of Chaos, and even the first Dao Ancestor of Chaos is a person of Dao Mountain, and in the endless ancient era, Dao Mountain's Dao Ancestor preached Chaos, which pointed out the path of Dao Ancestor to all beings.

It can be said that the status of Daoshan is very transcendent.

However, Dao Mountain was completely out of the Chaos Territory, and the Lord of Dao Mountain opened up a Dao Realm, and all the people of Dao Mountain lived in that huge Dao Realm, and they did not come out for a long time.

Only the Dao Ancestors were able to enter Dao Mountain occasionally and communicate with the Dao Ancestors of Dao Mountain.

Dao Mountain is very powerful, and the Lord of Dao Mountain is at least the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, so no one dares to provoke Dao Mountain.

Rumble!!!!

One after another Dao Ancestors who were full of endless Dao rhyme came, and the appearance of one of them caused many Dao Ancestors to be shocked.

Because this person is the second mountain master of Dao Mountain, with his current strength, he is definitely the top Dao Ancestor of the Quadruple Heavens.

He is the Dao Ancestor of the Tianshan Mountains!
